mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, description, content, language, category_id, view_count, like_count, collect_count, is_public, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM snippet WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM snippet WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
SELECT FROM snippet WHERE status = 1 AND is_public = 1 ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO snippet (user_id, title, description, content, language, category_id, view_count, like_count, collect_count, is_public, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{content}, #{language}, #{categoryId}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{collectCount}, #{isPublic}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE snippet SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE snippet SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE snippet SET collect_count = collect_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE snippet SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE snippet SET collect_count = GREATEST(collect_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE snippet SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
